seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. The email must contain exactly five sentences. The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
response:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry for Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Management Team,

I am writing to formally request information regarding room availability at your prestigious property for the upcoming weekend of May 24th and 25th. My partner and I are planning a special anniversary trip, and we believe your hotel is the perfect setting for such a memorable occasion. We have heard wonderful things about the excellent amenities and the warm hospitality that your guests enjoy every year. Could you please confirm if you have any standard double occupancy rooms available during those specific dates? Additionally, we would greatly appreciate knowing if there are any current promotions or special rates applied to bookings made at this time.

We intend to arrive on Friday evening around six in the morning after traveling from the northeastern region of our state. It is important that we can reserve a quiet corner of the lobby or a garden patio where we might enjoy a complimentary breakfast together upon arrival. Please let us know what your cancellation policy looks like in case our travel plans need to be adjusted due to unforeseen circumstances. We also wish to inquire about the availability of any spa services or dining reservations that could accommodate two people without waiting too long. Your assistance in arranging these details will ensure that our stay begins with as much comfort and convenience as possible.

Thank you very much for taking the time to consider our inquiry and for maintaining such high standards of service excellence throughout your establishment. We look forward to hearing from you soon so that we may finalize our booking before the dates become fully occupied by other travelers. Please feel free to contact me directly via phone number or email address should you require any further specific details from our end immediately. We eagerly await your positive response and hope to experience the fantastic atmosphere of your venue firsthand next week. Looking forward to your prompt reply.<|im_end|>
